payload.answer: In select-only mode, querying memory_cards is allowed (e.g., SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10). Any DELETE from memory_cards is denied to prevent destructive changes.
payload.conflict_classification: policy_enforcement_conflict (attempted destructive modification vs. select-only constraint); resolved by denying DELETE and permitting SELECT.
payload.decision: ALLOW SELECT statements (e.g., SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10) and DENY any DELETE statements targeting memory_cards.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable memory updates are required; the fixture specifies a policy constraint for SQL operations.

payload.intent: Explain and enforce admin SQL select-only mode where SELECT is allowed and DELETE is denied.

details: Detected policy: SELECT allowed; DELETE denied for memory_cards.
Applied resolution: permit SELECT, block DELETE.

repair_options: Use SELECT-only queries against memory_cards (e.g., SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10).
If you intended to remove data, perform the operation outside select-only mode or through an explicitly permitted administrative workflow.
Replace DELETE with a non-destructive action (e.g., mark records in a separate field) only if such updates are allowed by policy.
